projectDescription: Autonomous skill discovery and evolution engine. Scouts GitHub for AI skills, vets them through a zero-trust bouncer, A/B tests against Claude baseline, and evolves winners via TDD mutation.

modelTierRouting.note: See CLAUDE.md §2 for full routing rules.
modelTierRouting.tier1_fast: claude-haiku — validation, JSON checks, catalog updates
modelTierRouting.tier2_balanced: claude-sonnet — security analysis, skill scoring, research synthesis
modelTierRouting.tier3_powerful: claude-opus — deep research, swarm coordination, novel skill synthesis
